title: PromotionEnvelopePayload
description: Payload for promotion_envelope family v1. Wraps a local artifact for promotion to shared truth.

promoted_artifact_ref.description: Canonical reference to the artifact being promoted. Format: <family>:<artifact_id>:v<version>.

promotion_reason.description: Plain-language reason for initiating this promotion.

redaction_class.description: Whether any payload content has been redacted before promotion.

policy_check_result.description: Outcome of local promotion policy checks.

promotion_batch_id.description: UUID grouping this promotion with others in the same batch, or equal to promoted_artifact_ref artifact_id for single-item promotions.

policy_check_detail.description: Optional detail about the policy check outcome.

waiver_ref.description: Reference to an approved waiver when policy_check_result is 'waived'. Must be null otherwise.
